top_signals.title: Bloomberg Tech 2026 Opening Video
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg Tech 2026 took place in San Francisco bringing together the leading CEOs, investors and innovators who are harnessing technology to change the world around us. The summit opened with a look at the state of the industry and AI.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
